name: Client Onboarding Tracker - Sheets Drive Gmail
source: Redacted blueprint-style snapshot from a live Make.com scenario builder setup. This is not a raw Make export.
privacy_note: Webhook URLs, account emails, OAuth details, connection IDs, spreadsheet IDs, and folder IDs are intentionally redacted.

visible_execution_evidence.result: The Make editor showed a success count of 1 on each of the five module positions after processing queued webhook data.

error_handling.recommended_v1_route: On Drive or Gmail error, update the same Google Sheets row with Notification Sent = No, Last Updated = now, and Error Notes = short Make error message.
error_handling.live_builder_note: The AI builder configured the main chain; the simple error route remains documented for manual Make editor setup.

future_scaling: CRM sync after V1 is stable
